seoTitle: Chelmsford vs Chelona — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chelmsford and Chelona. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chelmsford and Chelona.
heading: Chelmsford vs Chelona — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chelmsford, Queensland and Chelona, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chelmsford has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Chelona (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chelmsford or Chelona safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chelmsford has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Chelona scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chelmsford scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Chelona scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chelmsford or Chelona?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chelmsford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
